ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand that manufactured the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for inventory tracking */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the product is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Group of the size (e.g., S-M-L, XS-XXL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the measurement belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement is for */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement */,
  "leg_short" INTEGER /* Short leg measurement */,
  "leg_reg" INTEGER /* Regular leg measurement */,
  "leg_long" INTEGER /* Long leg measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory entry is for */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the inventory entry is for */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the item is */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review is for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the analytics entry is for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue for the product */,
  "average_order_value" TEXT /* Average order value for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation is for */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
